---
title: People
---

::::: grid
::: g-col-8
**Davide Risso, PhD** </br> Professor of Statistics </br> Department of Statistical Sciences </br> University of Padova

[Github](https://github.com/drisso) \| [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=4amGfSYAAAAJ&hl=en) \| [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8508-5012) \| [Email](mailto:davide.risso@unipd.it)
:::

::: g-col-4
![](/images/people/dr.jpeg){fig-align="center" height="200px"}
:::
:::::

# Software Developer
|     |     |
|:---:|:---:|
| ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Riccardo Ceccaroni  |  |

# Postdocs

|     |     |     |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Amin Zadenoori |  ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Carissa Chen   |![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Matteo Calgaro |   

# PhD Students

|     |     |
|:---:|:---:|
| ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Alex Cecchetto  |  ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Sophie Grace Parolin |
| ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Elena Zuin </br> co-supervisor (Dept. of Biology)  |  ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Emma Menna </br> co-supervisor (Dept. of Biomedical Sciences) |


# Research Assistants

|     |     |
|:---:|:---:|
| ![](/images/people/default.png){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Valerio Reffo  |  |

# Friends of the Lab

|     |     |
|:---:|:---:|
| ![](/images/people/sottodenti.jpg){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> Francesco Denti \& Andrea Sottosanti | ![](/images/people/romualdi.jpg){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> [Romualdi Lab](https://romualdi.bio.unipd.it/people/) |
| ![](/images/people/sales.jpeg){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br>  [Sales Lab](https://sales.bio.unipd.it/index.html)  | ![](/images/people/calura.jpeg){fig-align="center" height="200px"} </br> [Calura Lab](https://github.com/CaluraLab) |

# Alumni

| Name | Position in the lab | Current position |
|----------------------|----------------------|-----------------------------|
| Daniela Corbetta | PhD Student | Postdoc at Institut de Mathématiques de Toulouse |
| Ilaria Billato | PhD Student | Postdoc at University of Padova |
| Kim Nguyen | Postdoc | Researcher at National Research Council (Naples) |
| Dario Righelli | Postdoc | Assistant Professor at Univerity of Padova |
| [Andrea Sottosanti](https://andreasottosanti.github.io/) | Postdoc | Assistant Professor at University of Padova |
| [Cristian Castiglione](https://cristiancastiglione.github.io/) | Postdoc | Postdoc at Bocconi University |
| Erika Banzato | PhD Student | Postdoc at University of Padova |
| Simone Modolo | Research Assistant | Associate Biostatistician at Evotec |
| Sara Agavni' Castiglioni | Research Assistant | Data Scientist at Nutcracker |
| Laura Perin | Research Assistant | Data Analyst at iubenda |
| [Luca Cibinel](https://www.mn.uio.no/math/english/people/aca/lucaci/) | Research Assistant | PhD student at University of Oslo |
